headline: Should Marcel Teunissen’s CFO Appointment Reframe How Investors View Expand Energy’s (EXE) Capital Allocation Strategy?
summary: On April 6, 2026, Expand Energy Corporation appointed Marcel Teunissen as Chief Financial Officer and Executive Vice President, bringing decades of senior finance and operational experience from Parkland Corporation and Shell plc. Teunissen’s deep expertise across the natural gas value chain and portfolio management is expected to influence how Expand Energy pursues growth, capital allocation, and resilience in the evolving energy landscape. We’ll now examine how Teunissen’s appointment as...
